case_title: DAVID TYRONE LOVE VS. SHIN INTERNATIONAL, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED AUG-12-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SHIN INTERNATIONAL, INC. DBA COVA HOTEL
DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE. NEED A NEW HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOVE, DAVID TYRONE
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO SHIN INTERNATIONAL, INC. BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF SEP-24-2014 AT 3:30 PM.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOVE, DAVID TYRONE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXPRESS PARKING $500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $500.00, PARTIES PRESENT AGREE TO DISMISS WITH PREJUDICE SHIN INTERNATIONAL, INC. AND ADD EXPRESS PARKING, INC. AS THE SOLE DEFENDANT. PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE OF PROCESS, NOTICE AND ALL IRREGULARITIES. SHIN INTERBATIONAL, INC., IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,300.00 FILED BY LOVE, DAVID TYRONE AS TO DEFENDANT SHIN INTERNATIONAL, INC. DBA COVA HOTEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-20-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
